statement: The grammar pattern '~인 이상' means 'Used to express 'as long as', 'since''

statement: The grammar pattern '~이든지 ~든지' means 'Used to present multiple alternatives'

exampleSentence: 회사에 보고하러 갔었으면 좋겠다, 그러면 지금 이렇지 않았을 텐데. (I wish I had gone to report to the company; then I wouldn't be like this now.)
